gaps: No test case covers the Home screen rendering of the headset image after pairing. All existing test cases focus on onboarding screens (splash, EULA, permissions) and do not reach the post-pairing Home screen state.
No test case validates that the headset image/icon appears correctly on the Home screen after a fresh install + pairing flow. This is a critical visual validation gap.
No test case covers the specific device Poly Voyager Free 20. The existing tests are generic onboarding tests and do not validate device-specific Home screen rendering.

No test case covers the lifecycle of: Fresh Install -> Pair -> Open App -> Home Screen. The existing tests cover either onboarding (pre-pairing) or individual features, but not the complete fresh-install-to-home-screen flow.
No test case validates that the correct headset image (matching the paired model) is displayed on the Home screen. This is a visual asset loading/rendering test gap.

generated_testcases.title: [Voyager Free 20] Fresh Install → Pair → Home Screen Headset Image Rendering
steps: Precondition: Poly Studio Mobile app is NOT installed. Bluetooth is ON. Poly Voyager Free 20 earbuds are in pairing mode (fresh out of box / factory reset).
Install Poly Studio Mobile app from Play Store / App Store.
Launch app. Skip / complete onboarding (EULA, permissions) until pairing screen is shown.
Pair Poly Voyager Free 20 via the in-app pairing flow.
Wait for pairing to complete and Home screen to load.
Observe the headset image / icon displayed on the Home screen.
generated_testcases.expected: Home screen displays the correct headset image for Poly Voyager Free 20 (distinct earbuds + case visual). Image is fully rendered (not a placeholder, broken icon, or generic silhouette). No loading spinner remains. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): If the image asset fails to load, the Home screen shows a blank/grey placeholder or a generic headset icon instead of the Voyager Free 20 specific graphic.

generated_testcases.title: [Voyager Free 20] Home Screen Headset Image — App Kill & Relaunch Persistence
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 20 is already paired and Home screen shows the headset image.
Force-kill the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from recents / app settings force stop).
Relaunch the app.
Observe the Home screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: Headset image for Poly Voyager Free 20 is displayed correctly immediately upon Home screen load. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Image does not degrade to a placeholder or generic icon after app restart. No asset loading failure on cold start.

generated_testcases.title: [Voyager Free 20] Home Screen Headset Image — Bluetooth Disconnect & Reconnect
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 20 is paired and Home screen shows the correct headset image.
Disconnect Bluetooth (turn off earbuds or disable Bluetooth on phone).
Wait 10 seconds. Observe Home screen.
Reconnect Bluetooth (turn on earbuds / re-enable Bluetooth).
Wait for auto-reconnect. Observe Home screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: On disconnect: Home screen shows the paired device name but headset image may remain or show a 'disconnected' state indicator. On reconnect: Headset image for Voyager Free 20 is restored correctly. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Image does not permanently disappear or revert to a generic placeholder after Bluetooth state transition.

generated_testcases.title: [Voyager Free 20] Home Screen Headset Image — App Background & Foreground Cycle
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 20 is paired and Home screen shows the correct headset image.
Press Home button to background the app.
Wait 30 seconds.
Reopen app from recent apps / launcher.
Observe Home screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: Headset image for Poly Voyager Free 20 is displayed correctly upon foregrounding. No image flicker, placeholder, or loading state. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Image asset survives app lifecycle suspension (onStop/onRestart) without corruption.

generated_testcases.title: [Voyager Free 20] Home Screen Headset Image — Correct Model Differentiation vs Other Poly Devices
steps: Precondition: Poly Voyager Free 20 is paired and Home screen shows the headset image.
Note the specific visual details of the headset image (earbuds-in-case form factor, color, shape).
Compare against known reference images for other Poly devices (e.g., Voyager Surround 80 UC over-ear, Voyager Free 60+ with touchscreen case).
Verify the image matches the Voyager Free 20 form factor (true wireless earbuds with charging case, no touchscreen on case).
generated_testcases.expected: Home screen displays the Voyager Free 20 specific image — NOT a generic earbud icon, NOT the Voyager Free 60+ image (which has a touchscreen case), and NOT the Voyager Surround 80 UC over-ear image. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): Device-specific asset mapping is correct. If asset mapping is wrong, the wrong device image appears (e.g., Free 60+ case with screen shown for Free 20).

generated_testcases.title: [Voyager Free 20] Home Screen Headset Image — IMMEDIATE STATE TRIGGER (Kill During Pairing Completion)
steps: Precondition: Poly Studio Mobile app is NOT installed. Voyager Free 20 in pairing mode.
Install and launch app. Complete onboarding until pairing screen.
Begin in-app pairing flow. As soon as pairing succeeds and before Home screen fully renders (during the transition animation/loading), IMMEDIATELY force-kill the app.
Relaunch the app.
Observe Home screen headset image.
generated_testcases.expected: App recovers gracefully. Home screen displays the correct Voyager Free 20 headset image. 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE (Anti-Regression): No crash, no blank image, no 'failed to load asset' placeholder. The pairing state is committed and the image asset loads correctly on cold restart even if the initial render was interrupted.
